g.text: Title: RV8 CPU — Chip Wiring (Data Flow View)

g.text: ④ MEMORY: Pointer → Bus Buffer → External (40-pin)

g.text: ⑤ CONTROL: Flags → Logic Gates → State Machine

g.text: ① FETCH: Clock → PC → Address Mux → ROM/RAM

g.text: ② DECODE: Data Bus → IR → Unit Decode / Address Decode
